column1: DGFT END TO END FLOW FOR NEW RECORDS

column2: To create new IRM data that will be reported to DGFT
column3: DGFT IRM Master screen/ Bank Interfaces - DGFT IRM Master
column4: New IRM data inserted into application via DGFT IRM master screen/DGFT IRM master screen upload/Bank Interface - DGFT IRM master scheduler
column5:
New entry is pushed into DGFT_IRM_MASTER table with provided IRM details in the below format : 
* FLAG : N (with workflow)/Y(without workflow)
* STATUS  :  ACTIVE
* DGFT_FLAG : F
* DGFT_STATUS : Awaiting Workflow approval/Awaiting request initiated

column2: To push the created IRM to intermediate staging table for DGFT reporting
column4: Created IRM data need to pushed to DGFT application via API.For this process fresh created IRM data need to be pushed to intermediate staging table by executing DGFT IRM Push Service Scheduler.
column5:
Post scheduler execution, irm details changes as follows:
* FLAG  : P
* STATUS : ACTIVE
* DGFT_FLAG : F
* DGFT_STATUS  : Request initiated
* Bank unique transaction id : unique transaction id should be generated post scheduler execution
IRM details pushed into the staging tables will be maintained as follows : 
 in DGFT_IRM_MESSAGE_MASTER
* basic details - unique transaction id,request json structure
* status : MSG_PUSH_NEW
* DGFT_ACK_STATUS : REQUEST_INITIATED
 in DGFT_IRM_MESSAGE_DETAIL
* status : NEW
* DGFT_ACK_STATUS : null

column2: To execute API scheduler for pushing the details to DGFT
column3: DGFT API IRM Push Service Scheduler
column4: IRM details available in the staging tables should be reported to DGFT end. For this process DGFT API IRM Push Service Scheduler is executed.
column5:
Once the API scheduler is scheduled & IRM details are pushed to DGFT end , the details in the staging table gets updated as follows: 
in DGFT_IRM_MESSAGE_MASTER 
DGFT_ACK_STATUS : Validated
Status :  MSG_PUSH_SUCCESS
in DGFT_IRM_MESSAGE_DETAIL
DGFT_ACK_STATUS : null 
STATUS : PENDING

column2: To execute Enquiry scheduler for reviewing the status of IRM pushed into staging table
column4: To view the status of IRM details pushed to the staging table for DGFT reporting, DGFT IRM Enquiry Service Scheduler needs to be executed. Once this scheduler is executed, it will update the progress in reporting IRM details to DGFT end in TRRACS end for our better understanding.
column5:
Once the DGFT IRM Enquiry Service Scheduler is executed,the details in the main tables get updated as follows : 
FLAG : P
STATUS : ACTIVE
DGFT_FLAG : F 
DGFT_STATUS : VALIDATED
MASTER_DETAIL_STATUS : MSG_PUSH_SUCCESS

column2: To execute the get response status API scheduler to check if the records have been reviewed at DGFT end and to retrieve its status
column3: DGFT API IRM Processed Status Service Scheduler
column4: To check if the IRM data reported via API request have been successfully reviewed by DGFT, we need to execute DGFT API IRM Processed status scheduler. This scheduler post execution will return the response provided by DGFT for the details shared to their end. The response received from DGFT for these records can either be Acknowledged /Failed.
column5:
* For cases where DGFT has still not reviewed the reported records,post this scheduler execution the details gets updated in the staging data in the below format : 
in DGFT_IRM_MESSAGE_MASTER 
DGFT_ACK_STATUS : Validated
STATUS : MSG_PUSH_PENDING_PROCESS
in DGFT_IRM_MESSAGE_DETAIL
STATUS : PENDING
DGFT_ACK_STATUS : Validated

* For cases where DGFT has reviewed the reported records and returned a success reponse,post scheduler execution the details gets updated in the staging data in the below format : 
in DGFT_IRM_MESSAGE_MASTER 
DGFT_ACK_STATUS : Processed
STATUS : MSG_PUSH_FULLY_PROCESSED
in DGFT_IRM_MESSAGE_DETAIL
STATUS : PROCESSED
DGFT_ACK_STATUS : Processed

column2: To execute the get response status API scheduler to check if the records have been reviewed at DGFT end and to retrieve its status
column3: DGFT API IRM Processed Status Service Scheduler
column4: To check if the IRM data reported via API request have been successfully reviewed by DGFT, we need to execute DGFT API IRM Processed status scheduler. This scheduler post execution will return the response provided by DGFT for the details shared to their end. The response received from DGFT for these records can either be Acknowledged /Failed.
column5:
* For cases where DGFT has reviewed the reported records and returned a failure response, post scheduler execution the details gets updated in the staging data in the below format : 

1. when the entire records provided in the request fails, the details get updated as follows : 
in DGFT_IRM_MESSAGE_MASTER
DGFT_ACK_STATUS : FAILED
STATUS : MSG_PUSH_PROCESS_FAILED
in DGFT_IRM_MESSAGE_DETAIL
STATUS : FAILED
DGFT_ACK_STATUS : Errored

2. when any one record/multiple records provided in the request fails,the details get updated as follows : 
in DGFT_IRM_MESSAGE_MASTER
DGFT_ACK_STATUS : Processed
STATUS : MSG_PUSH_FULLY_PROCESSED
in DGFT_IRM_MESSAGE_DETAIL
STATUS : FAILED
DGFT_ACK_STATUS : Errored

column2: To execute Enquiry scheduler for reviewing the status of IRM pushed into staging table
column4: To view the status of IRM details pushed to the staging table for DGFT reporting, DGFT IRM Enquiry Service Scheduler needs to be executed. Once this scheduler is executed, it will update the progress in reporting IRM details to DGFT end in TRRACS end for our better understanding.
column5:
Once the DGFT IRM Enquiry Service Scheduler is executed,the details in the main tables get updated as follows : 
FLAG : A/F [depending on dgft response for that record]
STATUS : ACTIVE
DGFT_FLAG : F 
DGFT_STATUS : PROCESSED/FAILED  [depending on dgft response for that record]
MASTER_DETAIL_STATUS : MSG_PUSH_FULLY_PROCESSED/MSG_PUSH_PROCESS_FAILED [status from staging table]

column1: DGFT END TO END FLOW FOR CANCELLED RECORDS

column2: To cancel the IRM Data available in EDIS application
column4: Details available in the screen can be cancelled with the help of cancel option available in screen/by using cancellation upload for bulk cases.
column5:
Details updated in DGFT_IRM_MASTER table in the below format : 
* FLAG : V (with workflow)/ C(without workflow)
* STATUS  :  CANCELLED
* DGFT_FLAG : C
* DGFT_STATUS : Awaiting Workflow approval/Awaiting request initiated

column2: To push the IRM to intermediate staging table for DGFT reporting
column4: Cancelled IRM data need to pushed to DGFT application via API.For this process cancelled IRM data need to be pushed to intermediate staging table by executing DGFT IRM Push Service Scheduler.
column5:
Post scheduler execution, irm details changes as follows:
* FLAG  : P
* STATUS : CANCELLED
* DGFT_FLAG : C
* DGFT_STATUS  : Request initiated
* Bank unique transaction id : unique transaction id should be generated post scheduler execution
IRM details pushed into the staging tables will be maintained as follows : 
 in DGFT_IRM_MESSAGE_MASTER
* basic details - unique transaction id,request json structure
* status : MSG_PUSH_NEW
* DGFT_ACK_STATUS : REQUEST_INITIATED
 in DGFT_IRM_MESSAGE_DETAIL
* status : NEW
* DGFT_ACK_STATUS : null

column1: NOTE : Please follow the same steps for reporting ORM data to DGFT end
column2:
For ORM process , tables to refer : 
DGFT_ORM_MASTER
DGFT_ORM_MESSAGE_MASTER
